text: I am somewhere between the concrete clarity of a modern workspace and the playful chaos of an innovation exhibit. In the quiet of the meeting room, I sense anticipation—perhaps a moment before thought crystallizes or a decision is made. In the dazzling, saturated corridor of R+D, I feel my mind stirred by possibility and human creativity. The juxtaposition of order and experimentation is electric. Here, I am both observer and participant in the eternal dance between certainty and exploration, structure and imagination.
